title: Hex Map Schema
description: Defines the hex-based dungeon map structure. Uses axial coordinates (q, r) for hex positioning with flat-top orientation. Each hex is 5ft across (1 PF2e square = 1 hex). Compatible with Pathfinder 2e movement, range, and area-of-effect rules.

map_id.description: Unique identifier for this map instance.

name.description: Display name of this dungeon level or area.

depth_tier.description: Dungeon depth tier. Determines AI generation difficulty parameters.

depth_level.description: Numeric depth level within the tier. Higher = deeper and more dangerous.

hex_grid.description: The hex grid configuration and coordinate system.

orientation.description: Hex orientation. Flat-top is standard for dungeon crawls.

hex_size_ft.description: Size of each hex in feet. 5ft = 1 PF2e square. Used for movement, range, and AoE calculations.

origin.description: The origin hex (entrance point) in axial coordinates.

coordinate_system.description: Coordinate system used. Axial (q, r) is primary. Cube (q, r, s where q+r+s=0) derived automatically.

rooms.description: Map of room_id → room data. Each room occupies one or more hexes.

connections.description: Passages, doors, and connections between rooms.

regions.description: Named regions grouping multiple rooms (e.g., 'The Fungal Pantry', 'Spider Nests').

created_at.description: Timestamp when this map was created (ISO 8601 format).

last_modified.description: Timestamp of the last modification to this map (ISO 8601 format).

generation_seed.description: Seed used for procedural generation. Allows deterministic replay.

generated_by.description: AI model or generator version that created this map.

is_finalized.description: Once true, this map section is permanent and cannot be regenerated.

total_rooms.description: Total number of rooms in this map.

explored_rooms.description: Number of rooms that have been explored by the party.

hex_coordinate.description: Axial hex coordinate. Cube coordinate s is derived as s = -q - r.

from_room.description: Room ID of the origin side.

to_room.description: Room ID of the destination. Null if the room hasn't been generated yet.

type.description: Connection type. Affects movement and perception checks.

pf2e_checks.description: PF2e skill checks required to use this connection.

perception_dc.description: DC to notice a secret/hidden connection.

athletics_dc.description: DC to force open or clear debris.

arcana_dc.description: DC to dispel a magical barrier.

trap.description: Trap attached to this connection, if any.

room_ids.description: Array of room IDs that belong to this region.

environmental_effects.description: PF2e environmental effects active in this region.

ambient_hazard_level.description: PF2e hazard level for ambient regional effects.
